head_observed: 56c5522 freeze: lock HBB-BEC-002 hard callback pair

scope.holo_build: builder, artifact generation, packet refinement, QA attacker surfaces

1_holobuild_has_mini_builder_generator_r.details: No active HoloBuild builder/generator/refiner/default path was found using gpt-4o-mini, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, gemini-2.5-flash-lite, grok-3-mini, or MiniMax-Text-01.

2_mini_models_isolated_to_4dna_benchmark.answer: Yes for committed defaults and current code paths
2_mini_models_isolated_to_4dna_benchmark.details: Mini models appear in the explicit five-mini cohort, the frozen 4DNA runner, related tests, and existing committed trace/report artifacts. HoloBuild loop and QA attacker paths do not consume that mini cohort.

3_holobuild_defaults_explicitly_frontier.details: HoloBuild constructs OpenAIAdapter, AnthropicAdapter, and GoogleAdapter directly. Their defaults are gpt-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, and gemini-2.5-pro. ablation_cohort_default.json uses the same frontier trio.

4_ambiguous_shared_config_or_leak_paths.answer: No active leak; one operational caveat
4_ambiguous_shared_config_or_leak_paths.details: llm_adapters.py contains bench and fast registries with mini or low-cost models, but HoloBuild does not call load_adapters or load_fast_adapters. Adapter constructors allow env var overrides such as OPENAI_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_MODEL, and GOOGLE_MODEL, so runtime policy still depends on env hygiene.

5_tests_docs_aligned.details: Mini tests explicitly fail closed for the five-mini runner. The default frontier cohort is present. No dedicated HoloBuild frontier-policy static test exists, but no code change was required in this clean audit.

6_files_containing_model_names.details: Files with relevant frontier or mini model strings are enumerated below.

7_changes_required.details: The audit is report-only. Optional future hardening would add a HoloBuild-only frontier allowlist around env overrides.

holobuild_execution_paths_inspected.finding: run_builder constructs OpenAIAdapter, AnthropicAdapter, and GoogleAdapter directly.
run_qa_attack constructs OpenAIAdapter, AnthropicAdapter, and GoogleAdapter directly.
CLI orchestration surface does not define model IDs.
Direct adapter defaults are frontier; shared bench/fast registries are separate and not used by current HoloBuild paths.

shared_config_notes.note: _FAST_MODEL_REGISTRY includes gpt-4o-mini, claude-haiku-4-5-20251001, and grok-3-mini, but HoloBuild does not call load_fast_adapters.
_MODEL_REGISTRY bench pool includes MiniMax-Text-01. HoloBuild loop and QA attacker do not call load_adapters.
Legacy app Settings defaults include gpt-4o and claude-sonnet-4-20250514. These are not mini models and were not found on the HoloBuild builder path.
OPENAI_MODEL, ANTHROPIC_MODEL, and GOOGLE_MODEL can override direct adapter defaults at runtime. No repository default sets these to mini.

checks_planned_or_run: model string search across holo_builder, docs, tests, JSON, and Python files
JSON report validation with python3 -m json.tool
conclusion: HoloBuild is clean under committed defaults: no mini model is configured as an active builder/generator/refiner/default. Mini models are isolated to the 4DNA mini benchmark lane and historical trace/report artifacts. No code patch is required.
